summary: Public Safety Dashboard feature fully tested. All 17 frontend features and all 16 backend API tests pass. Dashboard loads at /safety-dashboard with mission-control style interface. Shows: 6 top metrics cards (Active Sessions, Signals, AI Predictions, Alerts, Cities, Avg Response), Live Incident Map with city nodes, 6-city zone grid with risk levels and session counts, Active Incidents panel with real incident data (type, severity, status, zone, timestamp), Intelligence Feed with color-coded events, AI Risk Intelligence with 4 metric boxes + risk zones + AI recommendations, 3 Response Action buttons that add entries to local action log, and Incident Replay link that navigates to /telemetry. Nav has LIVE indicator with green dot, Telemetry link, and Request Pilot link. Footer shows anonymization notice. Homepage nav has Dashboard link to /safety-dashboard.

Backend_API_Tests.GET_/api/status/platform: PASS - Returns 200, contains metrics object with 6 fields, cities array with 6 cities, status=operational
Backend_API_Tests.GET_/api/status/events: PASS - Returns 200, contains events array with timestamp/message/type fields
Backend_API_Tests.GET_/api/status/incidents_NEW: PASS - Returns 200, contains incidents array with type/severity/status/zone/created_at/risk_score fields
Backend_API_Tests.GET_/api/status/risk-intelligence_NEW: PASS - Returns 200, contains 4 metric counts + risk_zones array + ai_recommendations array

Frontend_Dashboard_Tests.Top_metrics_bar_with_6_cards: PASS - Active Sessions, Signals, AI Predictions, Alerts, Cities, Avg Response
Frontend_Dashboard_Tests.City_Zone_Grid_with_6_cities: PASS - Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Pune, Dubai, London
Frontend_Dashboard_Tests.Active_Incidents_Panel: PASS - Shows real incidents with type, severity, status, zone, timestamp
Frontend_Dashboard_Tests.Intelligence_Feed: PASS - Color-coded events (alert=red, anomaly=orange, resolved=green, system=cyan)
Frontend_Dashboard_Tests.AI_Recommendations_section: PASS - Priority-coded messages (high=red, medium=amber, low=green border)
Frontend_Dashboard_Tests.3_Response_Action_buttons: PASS - Dispatch Security, Notify Guardian, Activate Safety Protocol
Frontend_Dashboard_Tests.Dispatch_Security_adds_to_action_log: PASS - Clicking button adds entry with time, action, zone

critical_code_review_comments: SafetyDashboard.jsx well-structured with proper constants for severity/status styles
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
API calls use Promise.all for parallel fetching with 10s auto-refresh interval
Response action buttons correctly use local state (handleAction) - no backend call needed as per spec
Backend endpoints have 30s cache TTL to avoid DB overload
Risk scores calculated from severity when not available in DB (critical=0.9, high=0.75, medium=0.55, low=0.3)
WhatsApp button and NagarikChatbot also appear on dashboard (part of MARKETING_ROUTES)
Graceful fallback data if DB queries fail
seed_data_creation: None required - uses existing PostgreSQL data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public Safety Dashboard at /safety-dashboard fully working. Uses 4 API endpoints: /api/status/platform, /api/status/events, /api/status/incidents, /api/status/risk-intelligence. Response action buttons are visual demo only (local state, no backend). Data auto-refreshes every 10 seconds. Dashboard test-ids: dash-metrics, dash-incident-map, dash-city-zones, dash-active-incidents, dash-live-feed, dash-risk-intel, dash-response-actions, action-dispatch, action-notify, action-protocol, dash-replay-link, dash-footer, dash-nav-telemetry, dash-nav-pilot, dash-nav-logo.
